meaning: n.绾崇补涓讳箟,寰峰浗鍥藉绀句細涓讳箟
examples: Politically, the Great Depression made possible the rise of Nazism and the Second World War.
Part of the block is today a museum and memorial to German resistance to Nazism.
Yes, fascism and Nazism came from two of the most advanced and most cultured Western societies, Italy and Germany.
